name: WhiteBIT Cryptocurrency Exchange API
what_it_does: European cryptocurrency exchange REST and WebSocket API — enabling traders to access spot, margin, and futures markets across 350+ trading pairs, with HMAC-SHA512 authentication, real-time WebSocket streaming, and a growing exchange focused on the European market with strong Ukrainian ownership.
use_cases: Executing spot and margin trades via WhiteBIT REST API for algorithmic trading strategies
Streaming real-time order book data via WhiteBIT WebSocket for trading bots
Accessing European crypto liquidity via WhiteBIT API for EU-compliant trading
Managing futures positions via WhiteBIT API for derivatives trading automation
Integrating EUR and UAH trading pairs via WhiteBIT API for European market exposure
not_for: US users (WhiteBIT does not serve US customers)
Institutional-grade custody with regulatory compliance reporting
Wide altcoin selection comparable to Binance (350+ vs Binance's 350+, similar range)
best_when: A European trader (particularly Eastern European) needs a regional exchange with Euro pairs, Ukrainian hryvnia support, and MiCA-aware approach to cryptocurrency trading.
avoid_when: You're in the US, need institutional custody, or require a global exchange with deeper liquidity.

auth.notes: API Key + API Secret for HMAC-SHA512 signing. X-TXC-APIKEY header (API key). X-TXC-SIGNATURE header (HMAC signature). X-TXC-PAYLOAD header (base64-encoded JSON body with nonce). Nonce: incrementing integer per account. Payload must include request, nonce, nonceWindow (optional). No OAuth2. WebSocket: similar auth via request message.

pricing.free_tier_limits: API access free; maker 0.10% / taker 0.10% (WBT token discounts available)
pricing.paid_tiers: VIP tiers based on 30-day volume with reduced fees
pricing.notes: Ukrainian company (Kyiv). Founded 2018. Largest Ukrainian crypto exchange. WBT Token for fee discounts and governance. 350+ trading pairs. EUR fiat trading pairs. UAH (Ukrainian Hryvnia) support. Spot, margin (3x-5x), futures (USDT-margined). MiCA-aware compliance approach. Continued operations during Russia-Ukraine war. Donated to Ukraine war effort. Growing European user base. API v4 (2022) — clean design. P2P trading. Crypto lending. NFT marketplace.

performance.rate_limits: Not publicly documented; standard exchange rate limits apply

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: HMAC-SHA512 with base64 payload. X-TXC headers. Nonce required. Ukrainian company. US blocked. EUR/UAH pairs. MiCA-aware. Clean API v4. Rate limits not documented.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Order reads idempotent by order ID. Nonce must be incrementing (not replay). Cancel idempotent by order ID.
known_agent_gotchas: X-TXC-PAYLOAD: base64-encode the JSON body (must include 'request' path, 'nonce' fields)
Nonce: must be incrementing integer — using same nonce twice will fail
Non-standard header names: X-TXC-APIKEY, X-TXC-SIGNATURE, X-TXC-PAYLOAD
US users not served — verify jurisdiction compliance
Ukrainian company — war risk context for infrastructure reliability
Body must always contain 'request' field (endpoint path) even for POST requests

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. HMAC-SHA512 (strong). Base64-encoded JSON payload in header. Incrementing nonce prevents replay attacks. Ukrainian company (war context — infrastructure risk). GDPR/MiCA compliant. US not served. Cryptocurrency financial data — high value target. No OAuth2.
